remove.reason: EXACT DUPLICATE - identical check signature (same method, response_path, logical_operator, and nested_field). Both check ApplicationLayerAutomaticResponseConfiguration exists.

recommendations.description: Remove duplicate shield_ip_rate_limit_rules_configured_if_supported rule - it's identical to shield_managed_rule_sets_enabled. Both check ApplicationLayerAutomaticResponseConfiguration exists with the same operator.

Both rules check ResourceArn but with different scopes: subscription rule checks ResourceArn exists AND not equals "" (more comprehensive), protection rule only checks ResourceArn exists. These serve different resource scopes (subscription vs protection) and should remain separate.
recommendations.impact: No action needed - rules serve different scopes

issues_fixed: Fixed metadata_mapping.json for shield_managed_rule_sets_enabled, shield_block_actions_not_count_only_configured, and shield_ip_rate_limit_rules_configured_if_supported: Changed logical_operator from all to null (YAML has single conditions)
Fixed metadata_mapping.json for subscription.logging_enabled and protection.logging_enabled: Changed logical_operator and field paths to match YAML (checks item exists for LogBucketList items)

test_results.notes: Validation complete. All rules pass metadata mapping validation. AWS scan executes successfully. Note: Shield requires active subscription (not available in test accounts), but checks execute correctly with expected warnings.
